paragraphs.body: This was my first time using ai for video production, and I was very impressed. First of all, I was initially unfamiliar with the process of operating with ai. I also expressed and held a skeptical attitude towards this. Hanson and Aiden, my team members, and I cooperated to complete the video production assignment. In the process of using ai, I found several problems. First, ai character generation is not very reasonable. The actions or micro-expressions of the characters are not detailed and realistic enough. Second, we have made many changes, but I still feel that we are not at the top of our expectations. I don't think AI can generate 100% of our true thoughts. Third, the video connection is not coherent enough, and the scene switch is not very realistic. Nevertheless, in the group work, I offered them some suggestions. Such as character background modification, music selection and so on. At the same time, I also drew some scenes for our video creation so that we had more inspiration to solve problems. On the other hand, I think there are some benefits to AI production. First, it saves us a lot of time. For example, in the setting of characters, we can easily choose the characters we like, without having to create and think about the appearance, dress and so on. Second, after the video is successfully generated, we can have a lot of space to modify and adjust, such as the language of the characters, the setting of background music and so on. This also provided us with some inspiration. In general, after our video production, I think our main ideas can be realized by AI production. For example, when a character introduces the historical background of two places, we input information into the character. ai helps us to have that conversation. At the same time, it helps us save a lot of time. But ai production also has shortcomings, I think ai is still unable to completely replace humans. It can't sketch out the details of the characters or the microscopic expressions and so on. The whole process is slightly awkward in the creation of ai. Nor does it fully describe what we think. In the previous video conference, I mentioned that I am a perfectionist myself. I want to make the best of everything. But after this homework activity, I think that no matter how we modify it, AIi can not be perfect, and science and technology still need to progress.
